input_roman: Provisional admission kis ko di ja sakti hain?
response_roman: Provisional admission un candidates ko di ja sakti hain jo results ka intezar kar rahe hain aur maqsoos marks hasil karne par munhasir hai.

input_roman: Kya university apne students ke liye health insurance ya medical coverage plans offer karti hain?
response_roman: Mujhe is bare mein kafi maloomat nahi hai.

input_roman: Applicants ko kaun se documents submit karne zaroori hain?
response_roman: Applicants ko admission confirmation, transcripts, comprehensive exam results, plagiarism report, journal publication aur correspondence, aur foreign reviewer consents jama karne zaroori hain.
